competitors.name: mermerd
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter parses DDL text without a live database connection and is a .NET NuGet package; mermerd is a Go binary requiring a live database connection and supports only 4 databases
competitors.notes: Go CLI tool that connects to live databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, SQLite3) and generates Mermaid ERD. Interactive schema/table selection, constraint visualization, CI/CD integration. 596 GitHub stars, v0.13.0 (Dec 2025).

competitors.name: sql2mermaid-cli
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter is a .NET NuGet package for programmatic C# integration; sql2mermaid-cli is Python-only CLI with limited dialect coverage
competitors.notes: Python CLI tool (v1.0.1) that converts SQL queries into Mermaid format. Installable via pip, requires Python >= 3.8.1. Saves output as plain text or markdown.

competitors.name: mermaid-gen
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter converts raw SQL DDL to Mermaid supporting 31+ dialects; mermaid-gen requires EF Core POCO models and only works with code-first approaches
competitors.notes: .NET CLI utility (v0.0.4) generating ER or class diagrams from EF Core POCOs. Compatible with .NET 5.0 and .NET Core 3.1. Focuses on Entity Framework models, not raw SQL DDL.

competitors.name: Mermaider
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter generates Mermaid from SQL (forward direction); Mermaider renders existing Mermaid to SVG (reverse direction) — complementary tools
competitors.notes: Pure .NET parser/renderer converting Mermaid markup to SVG without JavaScript or external processes. Supports various diagram types including ER diagrams. Works in the opposite direction.

competitors.name: SchemaCrawler
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter is .NET-native and parses DDL text without a database; SchemaCrawler requires Java runtime and a live JDBC connection for Mermaid export
competitors.notes: Java-based database schema discovery tool. Generates ERD via Graphviz, exports to Mermaid/PlantUML/dbdiagram.io. Schema linting, regex filtering. Works with any JDBC database. Heavy full-suite tool.

competitors.name: MermaidClassDiagramGenerator
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter generates ER diagrams from SQL DDL (database documentation); MermaidClassDiagramGenerator generates class diagrams from .NET types (code documentation) — different use cases
competitors.notes: .NET 8.0 NuGet package for generating Mermaid class diagrams from .NET types. Focused on class/object diagrams for code architecture documentation, not database ERDs.

competitors.name: XDevUtilities SQL to Mermaid
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter is a NuGet package for programmatic .NET integration and CI/CD; XDevUtilities is a browser-only tool with no API. SqlMmdConverter supports 31+ dialects vs 4
competitors.notes: Browser-based tool converting CREATE TABLE statements to Mermaid ER diagrams. MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite support. Instant rendering, SVG export, zero storage policy.

competitors.name: Tusharad SQL to Mermaid ER
competitors.keyDifference: SqlMmdConverter is a professional NuGet package supporting 31+ dialects for programmatic integration; Tusharad is a single-dialect (PostgreSQL) browser-only hobby tool
competitors.notes: Simple web-based converter for PostgreSQL queries to Mermaid diagram format. Minimal features, single dialect, no programmatic API.
